title: In exercise of the powers conferred by section 29A of the Company Secretaries Act, 1980(56 of 1980)
description: In exercise of the powers conferred by section 29A of the Company Secretaries Act, 1980(56 of 1980)

(i) *T m.^T.f^. *ite^i+ 490(31") dlO<sl 13 *J*ni, 2007 ^RT T^Tf^T ^ t Tft sft 3fTT c R ^ W *TT.^T.ft\ 68(31") ?Tr*tW 6 V.^fl, 2012, TTT.^T.fa. 564(3T) rTTfr^ 21 3TTO, 2013, ^TT.^T.R 323(3T) m f f e 27 srfcr, 2014, ¥T.^T.f%. 969(3T) H crrftw 15 fonrr, 2015 aftr m.^r.fa. 328(3T) cnfte 22 TTT^, 2016 STTT ^frRTcT ^t Trf i MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 23rd May, 2016 G.S.R. 539(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 29A of the Company Secretaries Act, 1980 (56 of 1980), read with sub-rule (1) of rule 8 of the Company Secretaries (Procedures of Meetings of Quality Review Board, and Terms and Conditions of Service and allowances of the Chairperson and Members of the Board) Rules, 2006, the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Ministry of Corporate Affairs, number G.S.R. 490(E) dated the 13th July, 2007, published in the Gazette of India, namely:- 2. In the said notification, for serial number (3) and the entry relating thereto, the following serial number and entry shall be substituted, namely:- "(3) Shri Vithayathil Kurian —Member". Director General (Commercial-I) Office of the Comptroller &Auditor General of India 9, Deendayal Upadhyaya Marg New Delhi-110124 3. This notification shall take effect from the date of its publication in the Official Gazette. [F. No. 3(4)/Misc./2015-PI] K.V.R. MURTY, Jt. Secy. Note : The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, Sub-Section (i) vide number G.S.R. 490(E) dated 13Ih July, 2007 and subsequently amended vide number G.S.R. 68(E), dated 6th February, 2012, G.S.R. 564(E), dated 21s' August, 2013, G.S.R. 323(E), dated 27*'1 April, 2015, G.S.R. 969(E), dated 15* December, 2015, and G.S.R. 328(E), dated 22nd March, 2016.
